framework.name: Agent Pay vs Verifiable Intent Distinction
framework.description: Agent Pay (April 2025) answers 'is this agent authorized to transact?' — identity/credentialing. Verifiable Intent (March 2026) answers 'did this transaction match what the consumer authorized?' — intent verification. Two separate problems, now two separate layers.
framework.raw_quote: Agent Pay answers 'is this agent authorized to transact?' Verifiable Intent answers 'did this transaction match what the consumer actually authorized?'

source.title: What Is Mastercard Verifiable Intent? Agentic Commerce Trust Layer ...
